name: PrivHound: AD users with local privesc paths (cross-platform)
description: AD users with active sessions on hosts that also have PrivHound local escalation paths. Requires both SharpHound and PrivHound data.
query:
MATCH (adUser:User)-[:HasSession]->(comp:Computer)
WHERE comp.name CONTAINS toUpper(
  [(ep:PHEndpoint) | ep.hostname][0]
)
MATCH p2=(phu:PHUser)-[*1..5]->(target:PHPrivTarget)
RETURN adUser.name AS ADUser, p2
